login.title: Ramola WMS
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login.ssoOnly: This tenant uses single sign-on. Continue with your organization provider above.
login.ssoUnavailable: Single sign-on is required, but no provider is configured yet.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send a reset link if the account exists.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists with that email, a reset link has been sent.
forgotPassword.failed: Failed to process request. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your Ramola WMS account.
resetPassword.required: Please fill in both password fields.
resetPassword.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.success: Password has been reset. Please log in with your new password.
resetPassword.failed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

setPassword.title: Set Your Password
setPassword.subtitle: Choose a password for your Ramola WMS account.
setPassword.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
setPassword.success: Password set successfully! You can now log in.
setPassword.invalidLink: Invalid link. Please use the link from your invitation email.
